content.en:
Time passes slowly.

Ye Tian fought fiercely with the opponent in the second level of the Dao Domain Tower, gradually gaining the upper hand and injuring the opponent.

Gradually, the other person's injuries became more and more serious, and it was difficult to recover.

Ye Tian used his sword to slash three times again and again, traumatizing him again and again, and after a long time, the other party was severely injured.

The opponent was hit hard and his strength declined, so naturally he was not Ye Tian's opponent.

Suddenly, Ye Tian completely crushed the other party, and every move and style could cause damage to him.

After a while, the opponent of the second level was completely killed by Ye Tian.

At this point, Ye Tian had passed the second level of the Dao Domain Tower.

"With my current strength, it is second only to the fourth-level combat power of the peak Legendary Realm Lord. "

Ye Tian muttered.

And in the void area, there are only a handful of peak Legendary Realm lords in the fourth layer, and he doesn't know a few, but some of the peak Legendary Realm lords are very low-key, and no one knows their strength.

It's like a white-bearded old man, everyone knows that he is extraordinary, but what level it is, it's not clear.

Of course, Ye Tian's strength now doesn't need to be scrupulous about any peak Legendary Realm Lord.

"Let's try it at the third level. "

Ye Tian came to the third level 767.

However, soon he came out.

He was directly hit hard by a move, although under the protection of the Dao Domain Tower, his replica body took a few blows and did not die, but if there was no Dao Domain Tower, he was afraid that he would be killed soon.

"The opponent of the third level, its strength is considered to be a very powerful billion among the fourth-level peak Legendary Realm Lords"

Ye Tian estimated.

With his current strength, if he wants to break through the third level of the Dao Domain Tower, he is afraid that it will take a long time, and he will not be able to break through for the time being.

Subsequently, Ye Tian left from the Daoyu Tower.

......

In a flash, many more days passed.

On this day, something big happened in the Void Zone.

The Peak Legendary Realm Lord, the Yunsen Lord, this is said to be an incomparably ancient and powerful Peak Legendary Realm Lord has fallen.

As soon as this news came out, the Void Region was shocked

Because in the Void Region, the strength of the Lord of Yunsen is terrifying, although it is a little low-key, but in the eyes of the Peak Legendary Realm Lord, the status of the Lord of Yunsen is second only to the Peak Legendary Realm Lord like the White-bearded Old Man.

Some people say that the strength of the Yunsen Lord is very likely to have reached the fourth level of the Peak Legendary Realm Lord.

In spite of it, Lord Yunsen has fallen.

For the first time, many peak realm lords believed that the Yunsen Lord was there to attack the fall of the Eternal Master.

Whoa!!!

The peak Legendary Realm Lord traveled through time and space and came to the Cloud Realm where the Lord of Yunsen was located.

There are three major treasure lands in the cloud realm, and one of the treasure lands is of great use to the peak legend realm lord, and it is a very top treasure land, but the strength of the cloud forest lord is too strong, so no one dares to fight his idea.

But this time it was different, Lord Yunsen had fallen, and the Cloud Saint Sect where Lord Yunsen was located did not have a second peak Legendary Realm Lord, so this treasure land naturally could not be saved.

Now, these peak Legendary Realm lords came here, naturally not to understand the situation, but mainly to occupy this treasure land of the Cloud Saint Sect, that is, the Cloud Forest Sea!

The value of the Cloud Forest Sea is too high, and everyone wants it.

Soon, many peak Legendary Realm Lords gathered in the Cloud Realm.

Ye Tian came, and the Sword One Lord, the Border Lord and other peak Legendary Realm lords all came.

The Lord of the Shaking Mountains is also here!

At this time, the current sect leader of the Cloud Saint Sect, Lord Yun Feng, saw so many peak Legendary Realm Lords coming, and his face suddenly turned gloomy, and at the same time he showed a look of despair.

He knew very well that the treasure land of the Cloud Forest Sea could not be saved.

"I've seen all the Peak Legendary Realm Lords!

Lord Yunfeng said respectfully.

"Lord Yunfeng, your Cloud Saint Sect no longer has a peak Legendary Realm Lord, and the treasure land of the Cloud Forest Sea is not qualified to occupy it. For the sake of Lord Yunsen, you should move the sect. The Sword One Lord spoke.

"Yes!"

Lord Yunfeng replied.

Immediately, he left here with many lords and disciples of the Cloud Holy Sect.

There's no way, the Void Area is like this, if you don't have enough strength, you can't hold such a treasure land at all.

If the Cloud Saint Sect occupies just an ordinary treasure land, even if the peak Legendary Realm Lord falls, no one will come to snatch it, but they occupy the Cloud Forest Sea, then there is no way to occupy it, and they must let it out.

Soon.

The Cloud Saint Sect had all moved away, and the ownership of the Cloud Forest Sea was a big issue.

"Everyone, give me a face, this Cloud Forest Sea Treasure Land has been given to me, I can make up for your losses, how about it?"

The Sword One Lord said.

He was very eager for the Cloud Forest Sea, because he only had a treasure land that was not very good, and now it was useless to himself, so he wanted to occupy the Cloud Forest Sea, and maybe he could use the Cloud Forest Sea to completely break the shackles.

"Sword One Lord, you're not qualified to occupy this place yet. "

The Frontier Lord spoke.

"Border Lord, it is rumored that your strength is infinitely close to the fourth level, but I want to see if this is the case. "

The Sword One Lord struck.

Airplanes!!!!

The ultimate sword pierced through time and space, slashing at the border lord.

In the third level, the Sword One Lord is also extremely powerful, belonging to the top existence.

Of course, the strength of the Sword One Lord still couldn't break through the second level of the Dao Domain Tower.

Abrupt.

A fishhook pierced the body of the Sword One Lord, and this scene, the Sword One Lord did not expect at all.

Then, the body of the Sword One Lord was bound by countless fishing lines, and he was completely unable to move.

"Half-step eighth-order Eternal Will, Border Lord, your strength has actually reached the level of the second level of the Dao Domain Tower.

The Sword One Lord hurriedly said.

There's no way, he can't beat the border lord, what else can he do if he doesn't admit defeat?

If it really aroused the murderous intent of the border lord, his clone would definitely die, and the main body could only escape.

Wow!

The border lord put away the fish hook and said with a smile, "I haven't even reached the half-step eighth order of will, and I have only mastered two or three space-time supreme skills, don't be so shy." The Cloud Forest Sea is indeed a very precious treasure land, and even I can't help but be tempted. Well, I'll practice a billion eternal epochs here, and I'll give it to you after a billion eternal epochs. And to make up for your losses, I can give you some benefits, how about it?"

The Sword One Lord didn't dare to object, and the other peak Legendary Realm lords also hesitated one by one, their strength was too low, and the border lords could kill them in seconds, so naturally they didn't dare to speak.

And at this moment, Ye Tian spoke: "Border Lord, otherwise, I will occupy a billion eternal epochs here, and then I will give it to you!"
